class.name: nav_algo_mppi_ros1/MPPIControllerROS
class.description: ROS 1 wrapper around the ported Nav2 Humble MPPIController. Math layer = nav_algo_core's mppi::Optimizer + CriticManager (8 critics) + PathHandler, byte-identical to Humble upstream. This plugin handles move_base coupling: tf lookups, current pose + velocity tracking, cmd_vel output, goal-reached check.
